general.title: General
general.description: App-wide behavior — what opens on launch, language, and desktop integration.

desktopIntegration.title: Desktop integration
desktopIntegration.description: Stored here and applied by the desktop app. No effect in the browser preview.

launchAtStartup.title: Launch at startup
launchAtStartup.description: Open ReadAware automatically when you sign in.

fileAssociations.title: File associations
fileAssociations.description: Open EPUB, MOBI, AZW3, FB2 and PDF files with ReadAware.

autoUpdate.title: Automatically check for updates
autoUpdate.description: Show a quiet notice in the main window when a new version is available.

crashReports.title: Send anonymous crash reports
crashReports.description: Share crash diagnostics to help fix stability issues. Off by default.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: How the app itself looks — independent of the book page color in Reading.

theme.title: Theme
theme.description: System follows your operating system's light or dark setting.

reduceMotion.title: Reduce motion
reduceMotion.description: Turn off transitions and animation flourishes across the app.

reading.title: Reading
reading.description: How books render on the page. Changes apply live to the reader.
reading.previewText: She had read of such places, but had never thought to stand in one — a quiet room where the afternoon settled like dust, and every book on every shelf seemed to lean, just slightly, toward whoever was willing to listen.

pageColor.title: Page Color
pageColor.description: The book's paper. Auto follows the app theme; the others are fixed.

navigator.title: Read by sentence or paragraph
navigator.description: How reading by sentence or paragraph steps through the book.

tapToAdvance.title: Tap to advance
tapToAdvance.description: While the navigator is on, tapping the page steps forward. Toolbars open from the floating bar instead.

scrollToStep.title: Swipe to step
scrollToStep.description: While the navigator is on, swiping or scrolling moves one step instead of scrolling the page — one step per gesture: swipe up for the next unit, down for the previous.

shortcuts.title: Shortcuts
shortcuts.description: Click a shortcut to rebind it; press Esc while recording to cancel.

categoryDescriptions.selection: Active while text is selected in the reader.
categoryDescriptions.navigator: Active while reading by sentence or paragraph. The selection shortcuts also act on the current sentence or paragraph.

actions.navigator-volume-keys: Step sentences with the volume keys

ai.title: AI
ai.description: Bring your own model key, then choose what the assistant can do and what it may see.

features.title: Features
features.description: Reader assistance, switched on per capability as each one ships.

explainSelection.label: Explain selection
explainSelection.description: Unpack a highlighted passage in plain language.

defineTerm.label: Define term
defineTerm.description: Inline definitions for a selected word or phrase.

translate.label: Translate
translate.description: Translate a selection into your reading language.

summarizeChapter.label: Summarize chapter
summarizeChapter.description: Condense the current chapter into key points.

askConversation.label: Conversational Q&A
askConversation.description: Ask follow-up questions grounded in the book and your notes.

followStreaming.title: Follow streaming replies
followStreaming.description: Scroll along as the reply streams in. Off keeps the view anchored where the reply begins.

buildMemory.title: Build long-term memory
buildMemory.description: Let ReadAware learn a durable profile from your reading and notes over time.

storedMemory.title: Stored memory
storedMemory.description: Review or erase everything ReadAware has remembered about you.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.description: Control what leaves your device when an AI feature runs.

sendHighlightedText.title: Send highlighted text
sendHighlightedText.description: Include the passage you selected in the request.

sendSurroundingContext.title: Send surrounding context
sendSurroundingContext.description: Include nearby paragraphs so answers stay grounded in the text.

localOnly.title: Local-only mode
localOnly.description: Never call a remote model. AI features stay off until a local model is available.

customBaseUrl.label: Custom Base URL
customBaseUrl.helper: Enter the base URL for your OpenAI-compatible API endpoint.

apiKey.label: API Key
apiKey.helper: Your API key is stored locally in your browser and never sent to our servers.

getKey.openai: Get your API key from <link>OpenAI Dashboard</link>
getKey.anthropic: Get your API key from <link>Anthropic Console</link>
getKey.generic: Get your {{provider}} API key from <link>the provider console</link>.

aiConfig.testEmptyMessage: Test failed: Empty response from AI provider.

byok.title: About BYOK (Bring Your Own Key)
byok.body: ReadAware uses your own API key to access AI services. Your key is stored locally in your browser and is never sent to our servers. You are responsible for any API usage charges incurred.

aiConfig.smartModelHelper: Chat, onboarding, and cross-book synthesis — the slower, more capable tier.
aiConfig.fastModelHelper: Dictionary, memory, and summaries — the cheaper, faster tier.
aiConfig.fastModelCustomPlaceholder: Leave empty to match the smart model

font.label: Font
font.customAria: Pick from fonts installed on this device
font.downloadFailed: Font download failed — check your network.

dataSync.title: Data & Sync
dataSync.description: ReadAware is local-first: your data lives on this device. Sync is an encrypted relay, not a source of truth.

account.title: Account
account.description: Connect an account to sync your encrypted event log across devices.

e2e.title: End-to-end encryption
e2e.description: Synced data is encrypted on-device. Manage your passphrase and devices here.

dataLocation.title: Data location
dataLocation.descTauri: Stored in the ReadAware application data folder on this Mac.
dataLocation.descWeb: Stored in this browser. The desktop app keeps data in a local folder you control.

backup.title: Backup & export
backup.description: Save everything on this device to a single file — move it to another device or keep it as a backup. Importing merges a backup back into your current data.

fullBackup.title: Full backup
fullBackup.description: Books, highlights, notes, collections, reading progress, and every preference, in one portable file.

reset.title: Reset all settings
reset.description: Restore every preference to its default. Books and annotations are kept.

resetDialog.title: Reset all settings?
resetDialog.body: Restore every preference to its default. Your books and annotations are kept — only settings are reset. This can’t be undone.

about.title: About
about.description: Version, build, and the engine that powers reading.

updates.title: Updates
updates.description: Check for and install the latest release.

engine.title: Reading engine
engine.description: Every format — EPUB, MOBI, AZW3, FB2, PDF — renders through one vendored engine.

foliate.description: The open-source reading engine ReadAware is built on.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Questions, bugs, or feedback — reach out directly.
